offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, manual calculations cause delays in reporting. We automate depreciation schedule generation instead of manual calculations and spreadsheets.
problem: Manual generation of depreciation schedules is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools and resources
try_it: Let users try manual input for asset details and reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Develop a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing asset data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
